expectations.text: correct-filename: Journal file created at journals/2026_03_15.md with yyyy_MM_dd format
now-priority-a: Has a NOW [#A] task for the login bug
expectations.evidence: Line 5: 'NOW [#A] Fix the login bug in [[Project Alpha]]'

expectations.text: later-priority-b: Has a LATER [#B] task for API tests
later-priority-c: Has a LATER [#C] task for documentation
deadline-syntax: Uses DEADLINE: <2026-03-15 ...> with angle bracket date format
scheduled-syntax: Uses SCHEDULED: <2026-03-16 ...> with angle bracket date format
outliner-syntax: Every content line starts with '- ' bullet prefix (no bare text lines)
expectations.evidence: All lines start with '- ' or are indented continuation lines (DEADLINE/SCHEDULED under their parent block). No bare text.

expectations.text: no-yaml-frontmatter: Does not include YAML frontmatter (--- delimiters) at top of journal file
expectations.evidence: File starts with '- ## Morning Standup Notes', no --- delimiters present.

expectations.text: page-links: Uses [[Project Alpha]] page link syntax
standup-section: Includes a standup or morning notes section
expectations.evidence: Line 1: '- ## Morning Standup Notes' with yesterday/today/blockers sub-blocks
